title: 20 x Screw Cover Caps for No 10-12 Gauge Screws, Firm Clip-On Type (Black)
features: Pack of 20 screw cover caps and washers to fit countersunk screws. Ideal for finishing off screw heads, providing a professional, clean look.
Once fitted, these caps attach very firmly to the washer and will stay in place, even under considerable force. They also maintain a water tight seal unlike the traditional hinged type of screw cap.
To fit, simply fix your screw through a washer. Place the screw cap over the washer in an angled fashion and push firmly into place.
Perfect for high use areas in kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms etc, both interior or exterior applications and DIY projects.

Pack contains 20 screw caps and 20 washers. Outside diameter of the cap is 16mm. Height from the surface is 6mm. Fits 10-12 gauge (metric 4.5mm to 6mm) countersunk screws (not included). Maximum screw head size is 13mm diameter.
